sequenceDiagram
    A->>B: request
    Note over B: processing
    B-->>A: response
---
+---+     +---+
| A |     | B |
+-+-+     +-+-+
  |         |
  | request |
  +-------->|
  |         |
  |   +------------+
  |   | processing |
  |   +------------+
  |         |
  | response|
  |<........+
  |         |
